name: recoil_app_state_queue_block_init_from_cursor
description: RecoilApp_StateQueueBlock::InitFromCursor initializes a queue block from a chunk pointer slot, setting begin/end/cursor/slot fields and returning this.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?InitFromCursor@RecoilApp_StateQueueBlock@@QAEPAU1@II@Z at 0x443700 still fails: 16 unmasked mismatches, 0 relocation bytes masked, 14 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 34 bytes, VC object symbol size 48 bytes.
Reviewed difference is register selection for the chunkPtrSlot load and field stores; source-level field order and computed chunk end are unchanged.
The native smokes validate returned-this, begin/end/cursor/slot fields, and use through queue switch allocation.
